title: File Explorer v2.2
code:
current_path = ''
selected_file = ''

def on_load_frmMain():
    # Initialize with home directory
    load_root_directories()
    lblStatus.set_panel_text(0, 'File Explorer ready')

def load_root_directories():
    treeFiles.clear()
    
    # Add common roots
    root = treeFiles.add_root_node('Computer', icon='C')
    
    # Add sample directories
    home = root.add_child('Home', icon='H')
    home.tag = '/home/user'
    
    docs = home.add_child('Documents', icon='D')
    docs.tag = '/home/user/documents'
    
    pics = home.add_child('Pictures', icon='P')
    pics.tag = '/home/user/pictures'
    
    music = home.add_child('Music', icon='M')
    music.tag = '/home/user/music'
    
    downloads = home.add_child('Downloads', icon='V')
    downloads.tag = '/home/user/downloads'
    
    # Expand home
    treeFiles.expand_node(home)
    
    # Load initial content
    load_directory(home, home.tag)
    current_path = home.tag

def load_directory(parent_node, path):
    # Clear existing children
    parent_node.children = []
    
    # Add placeholder items (in real app, would scan directory)
    items = [
        ('Folder1', 'folder'),
        ('Folder2', 'folder'),
        ('file1.txt', 'file'),
        ('file2.txt', 'file'),
    ]
    
    for name, type in items:
        icon = 'F' if type == 'folder' else 'f'
        child = parent_node.add_child(name, icon=icon)
        child.tag = path + '/' + name
        
        if type == 'folder':
            # Add dummy child for expand indicator
            child.add_child('Loading...', icon=' ')
            
    treeFiles._update_visible_nodes()

def update_file_list(path):
    current_path = path
    
    # Simulate file listing
    files = [
        ['document.txt', '1.2 KB', '2024-01-15'],
        ['image.png', '45.6 KB', '2024-01-14'],
        ['data.csv', '12.8 KB', '2024-01-13'],
        ['script.py', '3.4 KB', '2024-01-12'],
    ]
    
    gridFiles.grid_data = files
    gridFiles.grid_row_count = len(files)
    
    total_size = '62.0 KB'
    lblStatus.set_panel_text(1, f'Items: {len(files)}')
    lblStatus.set_panel_text(2, f'Size: {total_size}')
    
    # Show preview of first file
    if files:
        txtPreview.caption = f'Preview of {files[0][0]}:\n\nThis is a sample file preview.\nIn a real application, this would\nshow the actual file contents.'

def on_menu_mnuRefresh():
    load_root_directories()
    lblStatus.set_panel_text(0, 'Refreshed')

def on_menu_mnuGoto():
    path = input_box('Enter path:', 'Go To', current_path)
    if path:
        lblStatus.set_panel_text(0, f'Navigating to: {path}')

def on_menu_mnuExpand():
    expand_all_nodes(treeFiles)
    lblStatus.set_panel_text(0, 'All nodes expanded')

def on_menu_mnuCollapse():
    collapse_all_nodes(treeFiles)
    lblStatus.set_panel_text(0, 'All nodes collapsed')

def on_menu_mnuNewFolder():
    name = input_box('Folder name:', 'New Folder', 'NewFolder')
    if name:
        msgbox(f'Created folder: {name}', 'New Folder')
        lblStatus.set_panel_text(0, f'Created: {name}')

def on_menu_mnuDelete():
    if selected_file:
        if confirm_dialog(f'Delete {selected_file}?', 'Confirm'):
            lblStatus.set_panel_text(0, f'Deleted: {selected_file}')
    else:
        msgbox('No file selected', 'Delete')

def on_menu_mnuProperties():
    if selected_file:
        info = f'File: {selected_file}\nSize: 1.2 KB\nModified: 2024-01-15\nType: Text Document'
        msgbox(info, 'Properties')
    else:
        msgbox('No file selected', 'Properties')
